Uses of Class
microui.component.TextField

Packages that use TextField
Package
Description
microui.component
 

  • Uses of TextField in microui.component

    Methods in microui.component that return TextField
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TextField
    TextField.setCursorBlinkRate(float rate)
    Sets the cursor blink rate.
    TextField
    TextField.setCursorColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the cursor color.
    TextField
    TextField.setCursorWeight(float weight)
    Sets the cursor stroke weight (thickness).
    TextField
    TextField.setFocused(boolean focused)
    Sets whether the text field has keyboard focus.
    TextField
    TextField.setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
    Sets the font for text rendering.
    TextField
    TextField.setHint(String hint)
    Sets the hint text displayed when the field is empty and not focused.
    TextField
    TextField.setHintColor(AbstractColor hintColor)
    Sets the hint text color.
    TextField
    TextField.setMaxChars(int max)
    Sets the maximum allowed characters when constraint is enabled.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnEnterPressedListener(Listener onEnterPressedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the Enter key is pressed.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnFocusChangedListener(Listener onFocusChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text field's focus changes.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text content changes.
    TextField
    TextField.setPasswordChar(char passwordChar)
    Sets the password mask character used in password mode.
    TextField
    TextField.setPasswordModeEnabled(boolean passwordModeEnabled)
    Enables or disables password mode.
    TextField
    TextField.setSelectionColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the selection highlight color.
    TextField
    TextField.setText(String text)
    Sets the text content.
    TextField
    TextField.setText(StringBuilder text)
    Sets the text content from a StringBuilder.
    TextField
    TextField.setTextColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the text color.
    TextField
    TextField.setTextConstrainEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enables or disables text length constraint.
    TextField
    TextField.setTextSize(float size)
    Sets the text size in pixels.
    TextField
    TextField.setValidationEnabled(boolean validation)
    Enables or disables input validation.
    TextField
    TextField.setValidationMode(FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode validationMode)
    Sets the validation mode for text input.
